summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Cat Inspect AI application. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend UI and integration testing mostly successful with minor chart rendering and clipboard permission issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Chart width/height rendering errors in console
ui_bugs.details: Charts display but show console warnings about width(-1) and height(-1)

ui_bugs.issue: Clipboard permission error blocks UI interactions
ui_bugs.details: Runtime error overlay appears when clipboard.writeText fails due to permissions

passed_tests: All 15 backend API endpoints working (100% success)
Dashboard page loads with inspections table and analytics
Search and filter functionality works correctly
New Inspection wizard completes all 3 steps
Live Inspection page loads with all controls functional
Recording, capture photo, voice notes, quick marks work
AI findings detection during live inspection
Inspection detail page with all 5 tabs functional
Status badges display correctly (PASS, FAIL, MONITOR, In Progress)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix chart rendering issues by ensuring proper container dimensions for ResponsiveContainer components. Handle clipboard permission errors gracefully to prevent UI overlay blocking.
